input: Write a FastAPI GET endpoint /users/{user_id} that returns user info from a dict. Include 404 handling.
Write a function that paginates a list of items given page number and page size.
Implement a RateLimiter class with a sliding window algorithm. Methods: is_allowed(user_id) -> bool.
Implement a simple LRU Cache with get(key) and put(key, value) methods, with a fixed capacity.
